DISCOVERY 610, 1. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS AND TURNOVER ORDER IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT SHOOT THE BISCUIT, INC., DBA EXPANSION BAR ONLY. 2. DEFENDANT SHOOT THE BISCUIT, INC. DBA EXPANSION BAR SHALL TURNOVER TO PLAINTIFF ANY AND ALL PROPERTY IN ITS POSSESSION. 3. THE ESCROW HOLDER FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY SHALL TURNOVER TO PLAINTIFF ANY PROCEEDS PAYABLE TO SHOOT THE BISCUIT, INC. AND OR/SHOOT THE BISCUIT, INC. DBA EXPANSION BAR FROM THE SALE OF THE CORPORATION, AND ITS BUSINESS, INCLUDING THE PROCEEDS OF ANY PROMISSORY NOTE 4. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS AND TURNOVER ORDER IS DENIED AS TO THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED AND SERVED ON PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Set For Trial On May-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Right And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.
Mark J. Romeo, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Gordon Boe and Shoot the Biscuit, Inc.
There was no appearances by other named defendants.
Hearing held. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion for assignment of rights and turnover order. Argued and submitted.
Ruling as follows:
1. Plaintiff's motion for assignment of rights and turnover order is granted as to defendant Shott the Biscuit, Inc., dba Expansion Bar only.
2. Defendant Shoot the Biscuit, Inc. dba Expansion Bar shall turnover to plaintiff any and all property in tis possession.
3. The escrow holder fidelity National Title Company shall turnover to plaintiff any proceeds payable to Shoot the Biscuit, Inc. and or/Shoot the biscuit, Inc. dba Expansion Bar from the sale of the corporation, and its business, including the proceeds of any promissory note
4. Plaintiff's motion for assignment of rights and turnover order is denied as to the remaining defendants.
Order signed and served on parties. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motions To Vacate Default And Default Judgment;Adn Strike
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GORDON BOE'S MOTIONS TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; AND STRIKE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT BOE ONLY, IMPROPER SUB-SERVICE. THE CORPORATION HAS NOT MOVED TO VACATE THE DEFAULT AND BOE'S COUNSEL DOES NOT REPRESENT THAT ENTITY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Right And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Continued To Oct-29-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion for assignment of rights and turnover order continued to October 29, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 610, pending hearing on motion to vacate judgment. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
